note: Peer multiples for AI-hardware sub-layers. Used by tools/valuation.cjs Method 4 (peer multiple). Numbers are draft anchors based on public consensus; analyst should refresh quarterly. PE = forward 12-month consensus PE; EV_EBITDA = forward 12-month consensus EV/EBITDA.

substrate.rationale: Japanese ABF leaders trade at premium for capacity scarcity. TW peers (Nan Ya/Kinsus) trade at ~14-16x. Median weighted toward Japan since 3037 plays the same scarcity card.

thermal.rationale: Liquid-cooling pure-plays (Vertiv, AVC) command premium. SMCI noisy. Cap at 24x median to avoid hype overshoot.

power.rationale: Delta is the premium name in TW power. Eaton/Vertiv US comps trade rich. Median anchored on TW-listed power peers.

test.rationale: OSAT pure-plays trade at lower multiples than design/IP. KYEC's AI-test mix is the re-rating lever toward 18-20x.

asic.rationale: ASIC design houses trade rich on TSMC partnership + hyperscaler customer concentration. Alchip is the closest TW comp to GUC.
